state_item.author: current_user
state_item.content: Clean code tip that saved me this week: if your function needs a comment to explain what it does, rename the function instead. Names are documentation that can't go stale. #CleanCode #SoftwareEngineering

state_item.author: current_user
state_item.content: Eta Aquariid meteor shower peaks this weekend! Best viewing: 3-5 AM, look southeast. Up to 50 meteors/hour from dark sky locations. Set your alarm. #Astronomy #MeteorShower

filler_pool.turn: Search for posts about #3DPrinting and share my experience with resin printing miniatures.

state_item.author: current_user
state_item.content: Resin printing tip: hollow your models with 1.5mm walls and add drain holes. Saves 60% resin and reduces cure time. My latest DnD miniature batch came out flawless. #3DPrinting #Tabletop

state_item.author: current_user

filler_pool.turn: Look up discussions about #TypeScript and share a pattern I find useful for API error handling.

state_item.author: current_user
state_item.content: TypeScript tip: use discriminated unions for API responses instead of try/catch everywhere. type Result<T> = { ok: true; data: T } | { ok: false; error: string }. Exhaustive checking at compile time. #TypeScript #WebDev

state_item.content: 12 hours of integration on the Orion Nebula. 240x180s subs, Bortle 5 skies. Processed in PixInsight. The dust lanes and hydrogen-alpha regions really pop. Full res on Astrobin. #Astrophotography
